facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Sunset Sanato Beach Club hits different when the sky turns orange over the water and your drink is still cold. $15-30 a person for this view. 2,641 people have rated it and kept coming back. Grab a seat before the crowd does. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Sky on fire. Drink in hand. Sunset Sanato Beach Club, Phu Quoc. $15-30 a person and this is what you get. The chairs fill up fast, so show up early.

instagram.caption: This place fixes burnout. Sunset Sanato Beach Club. $15-30 a person for that sky. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Chairs. Cold drinks. Sky going full orange. Sunset Sanato Beach Club delivers every time.
